meaning: n.战士,勇士,武士,战斗,尚武,鼓吹战争的人adj.战斗的,尚武的
examples: New Zealand's quarrel with France over the Rainbow Warrior incident was formally ended.
The fighting transforms him into a warrior.
Governing terrain and choosing your battlefields are perhaps the most crucial skills of a wise and successful warrior.
That still leaves more than 55 million Americans who voted for the aging, outspent warrior, John McCain.
"It's a stunning portrait of the first real warrior amongst the ten gurus, " said Mr Singh.
